response.step_by_step_log: The video was identified as a graduation live stream for VTuber Murasaki Shion. By searching for the setlist of the 'Murasaki Shion Graduation LIVE', the song was identified as 'Toki no Ame, Saishuu Sensou'. The original artist was identified as Orangestar via web search. Bilingual lyrics were retrieved using the search query: '"Toki no Ame, Saishuu Sensou" Japanese and English lyrics'.
response.global_summary: A single performance by Murasaki Shion of the song 'Toki no Ame, Saishuu Sensou' during her Graduation LIVE event.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs the song 'Toki no Ame, Saishuu Sensou' on stage.
scenes.song_title: Toki no Ame, Saishuu Sensou (時ノ雨、最終戦争)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
答えて ねぇ
にわか雨がよせる街の夜へ
沈む世界 感覚遡行
「きっと僕ら生まれながら何処にもないコタエを探してる」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Answer me, hey
To the night in the city where a passing shower approaches
The sinking world, a regression of senses
"We are surely, since birth, searching for an answer that doesn't exist anywhere"
